# Muhammad Awais (DevAwais)

> Senior Mobile Architect specializing in high-performance Android, KMP, and Flutter ecosystems.
> Location: Lahore, Pakistan (Available for Global Remote)
> Portfolio: https://devawais.com
> GitHub: https://github.com/devawais-official
> LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/devawais
> Email: mughal963@gmail.com

## Core Expertise
- **Android Native**: Expert in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MVVM, Clean Architecture, Coroutines, and Dependency Injection (Hilt/Dagger).
- **Flutter**: Lead developer for cross-platform enterprise solutions utilizing BLoC and Provider state management.
- **System Optimization**: Specialized in memory management (RAM reduction), background processing, real-time Location-Based Services (LBS) optimization, and maintaining 99.9% uptime.
- **Data & Real-Time Systems**: High-frequency data handling via Socket.IO, WebSockets, and Firebase.
- **DevOps**: Advanced CI/CD pipeline automation and automated testing suites for mobile applications.

## Key Projects
- **Healthwire**: Top-tier HealthTech and telemedicine platform in Pakistan.
- **HCloud**: Enterprise clinic management suite serving thousands of healthcare providers.
- **DonGamers**: Global e-sports community platform featuring high-frequency real-time updates.
- **Makernote**: Cross-platform educational technology tool.

## Technical Stats & Summary
- **Experience**: 6+ years of professional industry experience.
- **Production Apps**: 25+ successfully deployed and maintained mobile applications.
- **Domains**: Healthcare, E-sports, EdTech, FinTech, and Real-Time Tracking.
